chapter_title.en: Chapter on Miscellaneous Matters Related to Hajj

parts.text: 3113 - وَ ذُكِرَ اَلْمَاءُ عِنْدَ اَلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ فِي

text: طَرِيقِ مَكَّةَ وَ ثِقْلُهُ قَالَ «اَلْمَاءُ لاَ يَثْقُلُ إِلاَّ أَنْ يَنْفَرِدَ بِهِ اَلْجَمَلُ فَلاَ يَكُونَ عَلَيْهِ غَيْرُ اَلْمَاءِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3113 - It was mentioned to Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) about water on the road to Mecca and its weight.
Imam (as) said: "Water is not heavy unless the camel is carrying only water and nothing else."
